headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Albemarle (ALB) After Its Surging Lithium Narrative
summary: If you are looking at Albemarle and asking whether the current share price makes sense, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on what you might be paying for compared with what you are getting. At a last close of US$188.33, the stock has seen a 4.8% decline over the past week, a 4.9% gain over the past month, and returns of 30.8% year to date and 232.0% over the past year. These moves can change how investors weigh both potential and risk. Recent headlines around Albemarle have...
